rationale: No new regional security developments near Romania; Iran deal continuation keeps energy price uncertainty alive but no qualitative change.

top_events.title: Trump says US-Iran deal to be signed Sunday; Tehran disputes timing
top_events.summary: Unresolved Iran deal prolongs energy price uncertainty for Romania, which depends on stable gas markets. No breakthrough yet.

top_events.title: Thousands rally in Rome for rival pro- and anti-migration marches
top_events.summary: EU migration debate continues; Romania monitors migration flows from eastern neighbors but no direct policy change affecting Romania today.

top_events.title: Why is the price of gold trending down?
top_events.summary: Falling gold prices reflect shifting global risk sentiment; minor indirect signal for Romanian financial markets and savings, no major impact.
